title: batch: structured multi-method call builder
description:
Add a batch call helper to client.rs:
- JmapRequestBuilder: add_call(method, args, method_id) -> &mut Self; build() -> JmapRequest
- JmapChatClient::call_batch(request: JmapRequest) -> Vec<InvocationResponse>
- Return all responses indexed by method_id for caller to route
- Test: batch two method calls in one request, assert both responses returned

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/batch_request.json
close_reason: Implemented JmapRequestBuilder, call_batch, ResultReference, Session::supports_refplus/quotas, Quota type, quota_get(); all tests pass
